title: CORS Governance
description: Design dynamic, whitelist-based CORS policies for complex multi-domain ecosystems. Optimize CORS configurations to minimize preflight `OPTIONS` request latency. Implement robust CORS governance to prevent cross-origin access vulnerabilities.
objectives: Design dynamic, whitelist-based CORS policies for complex multi-domain ecosystems.
Optimize CORS configurations to minimize preflight `OPTIONS` request latency.
Implement robust CORS governance to prevent cross-origin access vulnerabilities.
